recommendations.title: Maniac
recommendations.overview: As he helps a young artist with her upcoming exhibition, the owner of a mannequin shop's deadly, suppressed desires come to the surface.

recommendations.title: Wrong Turn at Tahoe
recommendations.overview: A small-time crime boss kills a drug dealer without realizing that the drug dealer works for the biggest crime boss in the country.

recommendations.title: Night of the Hunted
recommendations.overview: When an unsuspecting woman stops at a remote gas station in the dead of night, she's made the plaything of a sociopath sniper with a secret vendetta. To survive, she must not only dodge his bullets and fight for her life, but also figure out who want

recommendations.title: Amityville: The Awakening
recommendations.overview: Belle, her little sister, and her comatose twin brother move into a new house with their single mother in order to save money to help pay for her brother's expensive healthcare. But when strange phenomena begin to occur including the miraculous recov

recommendations.title: High Tension
recommendations.overview: Best friends Marie and Alexia decide to spend a quiet weekend at Alexia's parents' secluded farmhouse. But on the night of their arrival, the girls' idyllic getaway turns into an endless night of horror.

recommendations.title: Scott Pilgrim vs. the World
recommendations.overview: As bass guitarist for a garage-rock band, Scott Pilgrim has never had trouble getting a girlfriend; usually, the problem is getting rid of them. But when Ramona Flowers skates into his heart, he finds she has the most troublesome baggage of all: an a

recommendations.title: Don't Tell a Soul
recommendations.overview: Two thieving teenage brothers, stealing money to help their sick mom, match wits with a troubled security guard stuck at the bottom of a forgotten well.

recommendations.title: Five Nights at Freddy's
recommendations.overview: Recently fired and desperate for work, a troubled young man named Mike agrees to take a position as a night security guard at an abandoned theme restaurant: Freddy Fazbear's Pizzeria. But he soon discovers that nothing at Freddy's is what it seems.

recommendations.title: The Abandoned
recommendations.overview: A troubled young woman who, in a last-ditch effort at getting her life together, takes a job working nights as a security guard at an abandoned luxury apartment building. Stuck with a brusque rent-a-cop as her partner, she tries to not let her mind p

recommendations.title: Asylum Blackout
recommendations.overview: A group of cooks at an asylum for the criminally insane get locked in with the inmates during a massive thunderstorm
